ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing option */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room available (e.g., Private, Shared) */,
  "academic_year_agreement" TEXT /* Agreement details for the academic year */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building ID */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number where the room is located */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can occupy the room */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_options_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing option ID */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term for which the cost applies (e.g., Fall 2023, Spring 2024) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the housing option for the specified term */,
  "payment_plan" TEXT /* Payment plan (e.g., monthly, upfront) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount available for the term */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_costs_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES housing_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name or designation of the academic year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chosen housing option */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the student is expected to check in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date the student is expected to check out */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_bookings_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES housing_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_bookings_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building on campus */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., dormitory, apartment complex) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking ID */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the contract */,
  "signature_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was signed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., signed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES room_bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries_and_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., maintenance, change of room) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_and_requests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
